name: Giant Swarm
description: Giant Swarm — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Managed Kubernetes.

seo.title: Giant Swarm Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Giant Swarm analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. Giant Swarm offers custom pricing.
pros: Global edge network for low-latency delivery
cons: Proprietary edge functions create platform dependency
